description: Curated pattern library for the replicate skill. Each entry maps to a .php file in this directory. Patterns are inspired by the most-used shapes on wp.org/patterns, adapted to use foundation tokens (var(--wp--preset--color--<slug>)) and to expose content slots ({{HEADLINE}}, {{SUBHEAD}}, etc.) the agent fills from source HTML — never with invented copy. Use this manifest as the FIRST scan target; only open individual .php files for the candidates a triage indicates fit.

slot_conventions.{{HEADLINE}}: Primary heading text — usually the section's H2. Required.
slot_conventions.{{SUBHEAD}}: Optional supporting paragraph below headline. Drop the block if the source has no subhead.
slot_conventions.{{CTA_HREF}}: Button link target — usually a relative path or anchor.
slot_conventions.{{IMAGE_URL}}: Image src. Use the source URL; downstream media-url-rewrite will swap to local upload URLs.
slot_conventions.{{IMAGE_ALT}}: Image alt text. Required — pull from source HTML.
slot_conventions.{{ITEM_N_HEADING}}: Item N's heading (where N=1..k for repeated cards/columns).
slot_conventions.{{TIER_N_FEATURES}}: Pricing tier N feature bullets — markdown list, agent renders as wp:list.

patterns.title: Hero — split image + text
patterns.description: Image-left, headline+subhead+CTA-right hero. Most common e-commerce / SaaS hero shape.

patterns.title: Hero — centered headline
patterns.description: Full-bleed solid/gradient background with centered headline + subhead + CTA. Use when the source hero has no dominant image.

patterns.title: Hero — cover with image
patterns.description: Full-bleed wp:cover with overlay image and centered text. Use when the source hero has a dominant background image with text laid over it.

patterns.title: Features — 3-column grid
patterns.description: Three columns of icon/heading/body. Workhorse 'why us' section.

patterns.title: Features — 2-column wide grid
patterns.description: Two columns with optional images. Use for 4 features arranged 2x2.

patterns.title: Features — alternating image-text rows
patterns.description: Alternating media-text rows — image left, then image right, etc. Use for narrative product feature explanations.

patterns.title: Testimonials — 3-column quotes
patterns.description: Three customer quotes side-by-side with attribution.

patterns.title: Testimonial — single large quote
patterns.description: One pull-quote highlighted, often on accent surface.

patterns.title: CTA — centered banner
patterns.description: Full-bleed accent band with centered headline + button. Closing CTA before footer.

patterns.title: CTA — newsletter signup
patterns.description: Heading + email-capture-styled button row. Use when the source has a newsletter form (mark up the input as a button visually since post_content can't include real forms).

patterns.title: Pricing — 3-tier cards
patterns.description: Three pricing tiers with features and CTA per tier.

patterns.title: Pricing — feature comparison
patterns.description: Tier-by-feature table layout.

patterns.title: FAQ — accordion
patterns.description: Stack of wp:details items. Each summary is the question, body is the answer.

patterns.title: FAQ — 2-column grouped
patterns.description: Two columns of always-visible Q&A pairs (no collapse).

patterns.title: Contact — info grid
patterns.description: Address, phone, email, hours in a 2x2 or 4-column grid. No real form (post_content can't render forms).

patterns.title: Contact — form-styled with sidebar info
patterns.description: Form-styled column (cosmetic only) with contact info in sidebar. Mark interactive bits as buttons since post_content can't include real forms.

patterns.title: Team — 3-column member cards
patterns.description: Three team-member cards: image + name + role + optional links.

patterns.title: About — split image + story
patterns.description: Image + about-us narrative + CTA. Often the second section of an About page.

patterns.title: Gallery — image grid
patterns.description: wp:gallery with N images. Use for portfolio or photo grids.

patterns.title: Portfolio — project cards
patterns.description: Project cards (image + title + tags) in a multi-column layout.

patterns.title: Posts — latest 3 query loop
patterns.description: wp:query latest 3 posts with featured image + title + excerpt + meta.

patterns.title: Products — 4-column grid
patterns.description: Four-column product card grid (image + title + price + buy button).

patterns.title: Product — featured single
patterns.description: Featured-product card: large image + name + price + CTA.

patterns.title: Footer — multi-column
patterns.description: Multi-column footer with site links, social, copyright. Drop into parts/footer.html.

patterns.title: Footer — minimal
patterns.description: Site title + copyright + horizontal nav. Drop into parts/footer.html when the source's footer is a single horizontal row.

patterns.title: Header — with CTA button
patterns.description: Site title + nav + primary CTA. Drop into parts/header.html when the source has a header CTA.

patterns.title: Header — simple logo + nav
patterns.description: Site title + page-list nav, no CTA. Same as the scaffold's baseline parts/header.html — included so the agent can pick this variant explicitly when nothing else fits.

template_parts_note: Patterns in the `header` and `footer` categories OVERRIDE parts/header.html and parts/footer.html in the theme — they're template parts, not in-page patterns. Copy the pattern's body block-markup to parts/<name>.html in themeFiles[]. All other patterns are inserted into post_content or templates/<archetype>.html.
